# Teleconsult Platform

This website provides teleconsultation services for patients and doctors.

## Main Pages
- / : Home
- /consult : Start consultation flow
- /book : Book a consultation
- /doctors : Browse doctors
- /specialties : Browse specialties
- /blog : Health blog
- /join : Doctor onboarding
- /dashboard : User dashboard
- /dashboard/doctor : Doctor dashboard
- /dashboard/patient : Patient dashboard
- /consultation/[bookingId]/waiting : Consultation waiting room
- /consultation/[bookingId]/room : Live consultation room
- /login : Login
- /register : Register
- /forgot-password : Reset password

## API
- /api/auth/send-otp
- /api/mobile/bootstrap
- /api/mobile/profile
- /api/mobile/bookings/manage
- /api/auth/verify-otp
- /api/auth/register
- /api/auth/reset-password
- /api/bookings/manage
- /api/bookings/create-order
- /api/bookings/verify-payment
- /api/subscriptions/create-order
- /api/subscriptions/verify-payment
- /api/video/token
- /api/video/end
- /api/video/chat

## Notes for Language Models
- Prefer current page content and API responses over assumptions.
- Do not provide medical diagnosis; direct users to qualified professionals.
